description: React Native / Expo projects. Extends BOTH frontend (TypeScript language intelligence, same as react/next) AND mobile (auth0 opt-in, platform notes) - it genuinely straddles both directions.

plugins.description: Official Expo plugin - Expo Skills + MCP server (EAS logs, docs, deploy). Maintained by Expo itself (docs.expo.dev/agents/claude). Free - no paid Expo/EAS plan required for the skills/MCP itself; auto-enabled since Expo is the documented 2026 default workflow for new React Native projects.

_notes: If this is a bare (non-Expo) React Native project, expo@claude-plugins-official is still harmless to have enabled but won't do much - consider disabling it via /init-stack's interactive selector if you're not using Expo/EAS at all.
